did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper used a decision tree model constructed using SPSS (version 25.0) for clinical diagnosis guidance. This is a traditional statistical machine learning algorithm (specifically a classification tree) rather than modern AI, deep learning, or computer vision techniques. The study focuses on clinical and dermoscopic feature analysis via manual assessment and statistical modeling, not on AI-based image processing or deep learning diagnostics.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
